text: This space feels like a crossroads between curiosity and reason. The modern, almost clinical order of the glass-walled room invites structure and focus, while the vivid, interpretive wall of R+D beckons with possibility and innovation. I feel a quiet thrill at the invitation to ponder knowledge, progress, and my place within these cycles of inquiry. Everything feels slightly askew, as if I’m on the cusp of discovery or a new way of seeing familiar things.
